name: Multi-RAG Chatbot
desc: An advanced AI chatbot that uses multi-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to retrieve and combine knowledge from multiple databases, documents, and APIs to provide accurate and context-aware responses.

name: AI Resume Analyzer
desc: An AI-powered tool that evaluates resumes and ranks candidates based on job requirements using natural language processing.

name: NeoVision
desc: A computer vision system capable of detecting objects and analyzing visual data for security, monitoring, and analytics applications.
